title: MD-0 medical droid

{{Quote|The ones we captured—two stormtroopers and all five of the transport's crew—refuse to talk. I have them in detention, isolated from each other. I've had an Emdee-oh and Emdee-one droid engaged in postmortems of the troopers we killed. With luck something will give us an idea where they came from.|Wedge Antilles reports on the situation following the Imperial raid on Talasea|<ref name="RS">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>}}
'''MD-0 medical droids''' or '''MD-0 diagnostic droids''' were [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]] made by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. They were part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series medical droid]] line and had specialized diagnostic sensors in their six-fingered hands.

==Description==
The MD-0 was part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]] manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]].<ref name="SWS" /> Standing 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|Imperial standard meters]] tall,<ref name="FF" /> the MD-0 was similar in design to the [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]], which Industrial Automaton also produced.<ref name="Droids" /> Like other models of the MD-series, the MD-0 shared a body type with its production siblings, and was possessed of a torso with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and a cranial unit.<ref name="FF" /> The bipedal<ref name="Arms" /> lower half of the unit was protected by a surgical gown to protect its delicate mechanisms. The unit had dexterous hands with two opposable thumbs and a web of [[medical diagnostic sensor]]s to assist in its primary function of patient diagnosis.<ref name="Droids" /> MD-0 droids were ambidextrous,<ref name="Arms" /> and some models were fitted with [[Cognitive Matrix analysis package]]s for psychoanalysis.<ref name="Droids" />

A [[Class one droid/Legends|class one droid]],<ref name="Arms" /> models of the MD-series were generally covered in [[Color/Legends|gray]] plating with green highlights, and had yellow [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]].<ref name="FF" /> They were readily available for purchase, and cost 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Arms" /> The torso also contained a connection socket located on the lower torso to allow the droid to directly connect to a [[Computer/Legends|computer]].<ref name="Droids" />

==Role==
{{Quote|Their nightmare is that some Emdee-oh droid with a Cognitive Matrix analysis package will unscramble your brain and declare you cured in a week or two. They'd have to let you go free, which would make the justice system seem impotent.|Nawara Ven|<ref name="KT">''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''</ref>}}
MD-0 droids were designed to assist [[Doctor/Legends|doctors]] in diagnosing patients. To do so, they were equipped with various [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], including [[thermometer]]s, [[blood pressure gauge]]s, [[x-ray scanner]]s, [[magnetic resonance imager]]s, [[ultrasounder]]s, and [[comp scan]]s. They employed a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] to question patients and could analyze an individual's voice stress patterns and body language.<ref name="SWS" /> MD-0s examined the patient and catalogued symptoms, then compared them to an internal [[medical diagnostic computer]], which contained a database of known illnesses, to identify possible ailments.<ref name="Droids" /> MD-0s specialized in [[Biologist/Legends|biology]] and [[Chemist/Legends|chemistry]], and were programmed to speak, read, and write [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="Arms" />

==History==
[[File:MD-0_diagnostic_droid.jpg||thumb|left|The specialized hand of an MD-0]]
Introduced in the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the MD-0 was a success in the field of modern medical droids.<ref name="FF" /> Constructed on the [[droid factory]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]],<ref name="Droids" /> they were employed by both the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RS" /> The Empire stationed an MD-0 droid aboard their [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]''. The droid performed initial diagnosis on patients reporting to [[Medical bay/Legends|sick bay]], and assisted the ship's MD-5 droid during triage situations.<ref name="FO">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

The Alliance's successor state, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], employed an MD-0 on the planet [[Talasea]] during [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] posting to the world, and it performed post-mortem examinations on Imperial [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Raid on Talasea|raid]] on the Alliance base in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] in an effort to locate clues to where the attackers had been deployed from. The resulting examination discovered the soldiers had been exposed to [[Rachuk roseola]], a skin irritant only found on the planet [[Vladet]], which led to the Alliance [[Defense of Vladet|retaliating]] against the Empire.<ref name="RS" /> An MD-0 was also employed by the New Republic on [[The galaxy/Legends|the galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the height of the [[Krytos virus]] epidemic. One accompanied [[Gavin Darklighter]] and [[Asyr Sei'lar]] as they investigated a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] victim of the plague.<ref name="KT" />

MD-0 units were still in use by the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="Arms" />
